Apparence
Si Wikipedia, tasanayt tilellit.
Ansuf yis-wen ɣer Wikipedia
Asenfaṛ n tasanayt tilellit i tzemrem ad tsileɣem 		Llan 6 991 imagraden s teqbaylit
Aram 30 ctember n 2025.
Wikipedia s tutlayin timaziɣin nniḍen:
Tacawit - Tacelḥit - Tarifit - Tamaziɣt n weṭlas alemmas - Tamaziɣt tafuṣḥit tamerrukit

Amagrad n wass

Takurdit d isem ay ssexdamen i snat n tutlayin yettemcabin mliḥ, ttmeslayen-tent wazal n 13 n yimelyunen n yemdanen di tama-nni n Asya umi qqaren Kurdistan. Tamenzut d tutlayt takurmanjit (neɣ takurdit n ugafa), ma d tis snat d tutlayt tasuranit (neɣ takurdit n wenẓul), ay ttmeslayen wazal n 2.800.000 n yemdaben du Lɛiraq akk d 3.000.000 n yemdanen di Iran.

Takurmanjit, tin ay ttmeslayen waṭas n medden, ad tt-naf dɣa s waṭas di Tturk. (Kemmel leqraya...)

Tteṣwira n wass

Seg Wikimedia Commons

30 Ctember

Wid ilulen ass n 30 Ctember

  • 1715 – Etienne Bonnot de Condillac, (yemmut deg 1780)
  • 1870 – Jean Baptiste Perrin, (yemmut deg 1942)
  • 1882 – Hans Geiger, (yemmut deg 1945)

Wid yemmuten ass n 30 Ctember

  • 1551 – Ōuchi Yoshitaka, (ilul deg 1507)
  • 1985 – Charles Richter, (ilul deg 1900)
  • 1990 – Patrick White (deg tteṣwira), (ilul deg 1912)

Tazwart

Wikipedia d asenfaṛ n tasanayt tamazdayt iserkeben ɣef Internet, tameɣradit, agettutlayt dɣa tessexdem s amenzay n wiki. Amesɣaru n Wikipedia d tufka n ugbur ilelli. Yal yiwen yezmer ad t-iseqdec, ad t-ibeddel, ad t-isileɣ.

Asegrer n usenfaṛ agi i sbadu s imenzayen imsnulfuyen. Agbur-is i seḥbiber s licence Creative Commons by-sa dɣa yezmer ad yilli yenɣel s turagt nni — ɣas ma i amesɣaru amzenzi — s leqdar n tiwtiltin.

Imira, Wikipedia s teqbaylit i ttkel 6 991 imagraden.

Awal ɣef Wikipedia • Amnir ɣef Wikipedia

Attekki

Yal yiwen yezmer ad yernu s udwal agbur s weskar uqqin, ilaq kan ilugan ad illin qaderen; amedya: aselken n ugbur neɣ asidmer n imagraden.

Llan aṭas isebtaren n tallalt, ladɣa iwakken ad nesnulfu amagrad, ad nbeddel asebter neɣ ad ad nesɣer-d tugna. Tzemrem ad tsersem asteqsi.

Tajmaɛt

Deg uɣrud, 15 618 imiḍanen n imseqdacen snulfan ɣef Wikipedia. Dɣa gar-asen, 29 llan urmiden deg ayyur aneggaru. Akk wid yesnulfan imagraden, sseqdacen s lbaṭel ; Sileɣen tajmaɛt tamazdayt, war aɣella, anda imedrawen Sersiyen ussisen-nsen deg isenfaṛen isentalen dɣa d aṭas tallunin n amyannan.

Isqardecen d tamawin af imagraden: ansuf yis-sen! Isebtaren n amyannan seqdacen i ussegrew n tisnezgimin d timaduzin iwakken ad nsileɣ imagraden.

Apparence
Si Wikipedia, tasanayt tilellit.
Ansuf yis-wen ɣer Wikipedia
Asenfaṛ n tasanayt tilellit i tzemrem ad tsileɣem 		Llan 6 991 imagraden s teqbaylit
Aram 30 ctember n 2025.
Wikipedia s tutlayin timaziɣin nniḍen:
Tacawit - Tacelḥit - Tarifit - Tamaziɣt n weṭlas alemmas - Tamaziɣt tafuṣḥit tamerrukit

Amagrad n wass

Takurdit d isem ay ssexdamen i snat n tutlayin yettemcabin mliḥ, ttmeslayen-tent wazal n 13 n yimelyunen n yemdanen di tama-nni n Asya umi qqaren Kurdistan. Tamenzut d tutlayt takurmanjit (neɣ takurdit n ugafa), ma d tis snat d tutlayt tasuranit (neɣ takurdit n wenẓul), ay ttmeslayen wazal n 2.800.000 n yemdaben du Lɛiraq akk d 3.000.000 n yemdanen di Iran.

Takurmanjit, tin ay ttmeslayen waṭas n medden, ad tt-naf dɣa s waṭas di Tturk. (Kemmel leqraya...)

Tteṣwira n wass

Seg Wikimedia Commons

30 Ctember

Wid ilulen ass n 30 Ctember

  • 1715 – Etienne Bonnot de Condillac, (yemmut deg 1780)
  • 1870 – Jean Baptiste Perrin, (yemmut deg 1942)
  • 1882 – Hans Geiger, (yemmut deg 1945)

Wid yemmuten ass n 30 Ctember

  • 1551 – Ōuchi Yoshitaka, (ilul deg 1507)
  • 1985 – Charles Richter, (ilul deg 1900)
  • 1990 – Patrick White (deg tteṣwira), (ilul deg 1912)

Tazwart

Wikipedia d asenfaṛ n tasanayt tamazdayt iserkeben ɣef Internet, tameɣradit, agettutlayt dɣa tessexdem s amenzay n wiki. Amesɣaru n Wikipedia d tufka n ugbur ilelli. Yal yiwen yezmer ad t-iseqdec, ad t-ibeddel, ad t-isileɣ.

Asegrer n usenfaṛ agi i sbadu s imenzayen imsnulfuyen. Agbur-is i seḥbiber s licence Creative Commons by-sa dɣa yezmer ad yilli yenɣel s turagt nni — ɣas ma i amesɣaru amzenzi — s leqdar n tiwtiltin.

Imira, Wikipedia s teqbaylit i ttkel 6 991 imagraden.

Awal ɣef Wikipedia • Amnir ɣef Wikipedia

Attekki

Yal yiwen yezmer ad yernu s udwal agbur s weskar uqqin, ilaq kan ilugan ad illin qaderen; amedya: aselken n ugbur neɣ asidmer n imagraden.

Llan aṭas isebtaren n tallalt, ladɣa iwakken ad nesnulfu amagrad, ad nbeddel asebter neɣ ad ad nesɣer-d tugna. Tzemrem ad tsersem asteqsi.

Deg uɣrud, 15 618 imiḍanen n imseqdacen snulfan ɣef Wikipedia. Dɣa gar-asen, 29 llan urmiden deg ayyur aneggaru. Akk wid yesnulfan imagraden, sseqdacen s lbaṭel ; Sileɣen tajmaɛt tamazdayt, war aɣella, anda imedrawen Sersiyen ussisen-nsen deg isenfaṛen isentalen dɣa d aṭas tallunin n amyannan.

Isqardecen d tamawin af imagraden: ansuf yis-sen! Isebtaren n amyannan seqdacen i ussegrew n tisnezgimin d timaduzin iwakken ad nsileɣ imagraden.

## Tazwart  
---  
**Wikipedia** d asenfaṛ n tasanayt tamazdayt iserkeben ɣef Internet, tameɣradit, agettutlayt dɣa tessexdem s amenzay n [wiki](https://kab.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wiki "Wiki"). Amesɣaru n Wikipedia d tufka n ugbur ilelli. Yal yiwen yezmer ad t-iseqdec, ad t-ibeddel, ad t-isileɣ.  Asegrer n usenfaṛ agi i sbadu s [imenzayen imsnulfuyen](https://kab.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Imenzayen_imsnulfuyen&action=edit&redlink=1 "Wikipedia:Imenzayen imsnulfuyen \(ulac asebter\)"). Agbur-is i seḥbiber s [licence Creative Commons by-sa](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/deed.fr) dɣa yezmer ad yilli [yenɣel s turagt nni](https://kab.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Citation_et_r%C3%A9utilisation_du_contenu_de_Wikipedia&action=edit&redlink=1 "Wikipedia:Citation et réutilisation du contenu de Wikipedia \(ulac asebter\)") — ɣas ma i amesɣaru amzenzi — s leqdar n tiwtiltin.  Imira, [Wikipedia s teqbaylit](https://kab.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia "Wikipedia") i ttkel 6 991 imagraden.  [Awal ɣef Wikipedia](https://kab.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Awal_%C9%A3ef...&action=edit&redlink=1 "Wikipedia:Awal ɣef... \(ulac asebter\)") **•** [Amnir ɣef Wikipedia](https://kab.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia "Wikipedia")  
![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/8f/Bluebg_rounded2.png) ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b8/Text-x-generic_with_pencil-2.svg/40px-Text-x-generic_with_pencil-2.svg.png)
## Attekki  
Yal yiwen yezmer ad yernu s udwal agbur s weskar uqqin, ilaq kan ilugan ad illin qaderen; amedya: aselken n ugbur neɣ asidmer n imagraden.  Llan aṭas isebtaren n tallalt, ladɣa iwakken ad nesnulfu amagrad, ad nbeddel asebter neɣ ad ad nesɣer-d tugna. Tzemrem ad tsersem asteqsi.  
![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/8f/Bluebg_rounded2.png) ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/cd/HSSamarbete.svg/40px-HSSamarbete.svg.png)  
Deg uɣrud, 15 618 imiḍanen n imseqdacen snulfan ɣef Wikipedia. Dɣa gar-asen, 29 llan urmiden deg ayyur aneggaru. Akk wid yesnulfan imagraden, sseqdacen s lbaṭel ; Sileɣen tajmaɛt tamazdayt, war aɣella, anda imedrawen Sersiyen ussisen-nsen deg [isenfaṛen isentalen](https://kab.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Asenfa%E1%B9%9B:Amager&action=edit&redlink=1 "Asenfaṛ:Amager \(ulac asebter\)") dɣa d aṭas [tallunin n amyannan](https://kab.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Abrid_n_ti%C9%A3lusin_d_ttberna&action=edit&redlink=1 "Wikipedia:Abrid n tiɣlusin d ttberna \(ulac asebter\)").  Isqardecen d tamawin af imagraden: ansuf yis-sen! [Isebtaren n amyannan](https://kab.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tallat:Amyannan "Tallat:Amyannan") seqdacen i ussegrew n tisnezgimin d timaduzin iwakken ad nsileɣ imagraden.  [Amager n tajmaɛt](https://kab.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Tajma%C9%9Bt "Wikipedia:Tajmaɛt")  
![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/8f/Bluebg_rounded2.png) ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/14/Wikimedia-logo-circle.svg/40px-Wikimedia-logo-circle.svg.png)

## Tazwart  
---  
**Wikipedia** d asenfaṛ n tasanayt tamazdayt iserkeben ɣef Internet, tameɣradit, agettutlayt dɣa tessexdem s amenzay n wiki⟨64⟩. Amesɣaru n Wikipedia d tufka n ugbur ilelli. Yal yiwen yezmer ad t-iseqdec, ad t-ibeddel, ad t-isileɣ.  Asegrer n usenfaṛ agi i sbadu s imenzayen imsnulfuyen⟨65⟩. Agbur-is i seḥbiber s licence Creative Commons by-sa⟨66⟩ dɣa yezmer ad yilli yenɣel s turagt nni⟨67⟩ — ɣas ma i amesɣaru amzenzi — s leqdar n tiwtiltin.  Imira, Wikipedia s teqbaylit⟨37⟩ i ttkel 6 991 imagraden.  Awal ɣef Wikipedia⟨68⟩ **•** Amnir ɣef Wikipedia⟨37⟩  
![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/8f/Bluebg_rounded2.png) ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b8/Text-x-generic_with_pencil-2.svg/40px-Text-x-generic_with_pencil-2.svg.png)
## Attekki  
Yal yiwen yezmer ad yernu s udwal agbur s weskar uqqin, ilaq kan ilugan ad illin qaderen; amedya: aselken n ugbur neɣ asidmer n imagraden.  Llan aṭas isebtaren n tallalt, ladɣa iwakken ad nesnulfu amagrad, ad nbeddel asebter neɣ ad ad nesɣer-d tugna. Tzemrem ad tsersem asteqsi.  
![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/8f/Bluebg_rounded2.png) ![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/cd/HSSamarbete.svg/40px-HSSamarbete.svg.png)  
Deg uɣrud, 15 618 imiḍanen n imseqdacen snulfan ɣef Wikipedia. Dɣa gar-asen, 29 llan urmiden deg ayyur aneggaru. Akk wid yesnulfan imagraden, sseqdacen s lbaṭel ; Sileɣen tajmaɛt tamazdayt, war aɣella, anda imedrawen Sersiyen ussisen-nsen deg isenfaṛen isentalen⟨69⟩ dɣa d aṭas tallunin n amyannan⟨70⟩.  Isqardecen d tamawin af imagraden: ansuf yis-sen! Isebtaren n amyannan⟨71⟩ seqdacen i ussegrew n tisnezgimin d timaduzin iwakken ad nsileɣ imagraden.  Amager n tajmaɛt⟨72⟩
